evals.name: landing-page-full-flow
evals.prompt: 이 피그마 페이지 구현해줘. https://figma.com/design/abc123def/LandingPage?node-id=1-2 프로젝트는 Next.js + Tailwind인데, 개발서버는 npm run dev로 localhost:3000에서 돌아가고 있어. 라우트는 /landing이야.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 frame discovery → Phase 2 per-frame loop (explore→executor→frontend visual) → Phase 3 final verification with agmo:frontend

evals.name: minimal-input-dashboard
evals.expected_output: Should ask for missing info (dev server command, URL, route) before starting. Then follow full orchestration flow.

evals.name: responsive-request
evals.prompt: 피그마 랜딩페이지 구현해줘. https://figma.com/design/abc123def/Mobile-Landing?node-id=3-0 반응형도 확인해줘. 개발서버 npm run dev, localhost:3000, 라우트 /
evals.expected_output: Full flow + Phase 3.5 responsive verification with agmo:frontend responsive mode
